uplink.description: temperature, humidity, motion and battery voltage (VDD mV -> volts)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (DecodeElsysPayload) then applying this codec's normalization (vdd 3600 mV -> battery 3.6 V; motion count 6 -> detected true).

uplink.description: no motion (count 0 -> detected false), light, and battery voltage
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js (temp 21.5, humidity 55, motion 0, light 120, vdd 3616 mV) then normalized (vdd -> battery 3.616 V; motion 0 -> detected false).

uplink.description: negative temperature, humidity, door/reed digital input (closed) and motion
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js (temp -10.6, humidity 38, digital 1, motion 3) then normalized (Elsys EXT_DIGITAL high 1 = reed contact closed -> action.contactState 'closed'; digital channel that upstream normalizeUplink ignores).
